extraction.one_line_summary: LAMPAERT Yves won the Copenhagen opening ITT by 5 seconds over Van Aert in wet conditions after Bissegger crashed twice early, losing the stage he was favored for.
tactical_patterns: Bissegger crashed twice within 4km on wet corners chasing yellow, showing favorites overcommitted early in technical TT conditions.
Lampaert beat specialist Van Aert by 5 seconds on pancake-flat course, revealing pure power advantage not terrain-dependent.
Pidcock took 3rd ahead of world champion Ganna in debut Tour TT, signaling exceptional all-rounder TT capability.

rider_signals.LAMPAERT Yves: positive: Won flat TT over Van Aert despite losing Belgian nationals to Evenepoel week prior, peaking perfectly
rider_signals.BISSEGGER Stefan: negative: Double crash within 4km hunting yellow destroyed stage, reveals risk-taking overwhelms technical skill under pressure
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: neutral: Lost by only 5 seconds in similar conditions to Lampaert, suggesting equal form but margin tighter than expected
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Tom: positive: Beat Ganna for 3rd in first Tour TT debut, confirming elite stage race TT ability beyond classics
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: negative: World champion only 4th on flat course suits him, 22 seconds off winner signals form concerns
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: 7th place at 19 seconds acceptable for GC defense but Van Aert proximity suggests Jumbo TT equipment/positioning edge minimal
